final_answer: The most common symptoms of COVID-19 include fever, cough, and tiredness. Other symptoms can encompass shortness of breath, chest pain, muscle aches, headache, and loss of taste or smell. Additional symptoms may include confusion, sore throat, congestion, diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain, and skin rashes. Infants may experience difficulty feeding, while children generally exhibit similar symptoms but with less severity compared to adults [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].
